---
name: 🐛 Bug Report — Broken Badge or Link
about: Report a broken badge, broken link, broken SVG, or markdown rendering issue
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-review"]
assignees: ["saurabhcr007"]
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what is broken.

## 📍 Location

Where is the issue? (e.g., "Connect section", "GitHub Stats widget", "Trophies badge")

**Section:** <!-- e.g., Tech Stack → DevOps badges -->
**Line number (approximate):** <!-- e.g., line 64 of README.md -->

## 📸 Screenshot

If applicable, add a screenshot showing the broken element.

## 🌐 Environment

- **Browser:** <!-- e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 125 -->
- **OS:** <!-- e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14 -->
- **Viewed at:** <!-- e.g., github.com/saurabhcr007 or local preview -->

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What should it look like?

## 📋 Additional Context

Any other context about the problem. For example: is it a CDN issue? Does it work in incognito? Does it load sometimes?
